privileged_info_summary: Task uses real Natural Earth 1:110m countries dataset (ne_110m_admin_0_countries) published as GeoServer layer 'ne:ne_countries'. The custom gridset must use EPSG:3035 (ETRS89-extended/LAEA Europe projection), which is a verified Lambert Azimuthal Equal-Area projection centered at 52°N, 10°E. Standard tile size is 256x256 pixels (default GeoServer specification). Grid bounds: X=[2000000, 6500000], Y=[1000000, 5500000] meters - note that the minimum Y coordinate of 1,000,000 is outside EPSG:3035's documented extent (1,137,678.21 minimum), which is a task-specific subset. The maxy of 5,500,000 matches the standard 100km EEA reference grid boundary. Layer name 'ne:ne_countries' is a real GeoServer layer created from public Natural Earth data.
